# SlabStreet — Smart Collecting Starts Here

> Sports card intelligence tools for collectors. Free tools to identify cards, check prices, find shows, and learn the hobby.

SlabStreet helps sports card collectors make smarter decisions. Our tools cover identification, pricing, and education for NBA, NFL, MLB, F1, and WNBA cards.

## Tools

### Card X-Ray (/xray)
Paste any eBay listing URL to instantly identify a sports card. Returns the card's full identity (player, year, set, parallel), where it ranks in the rarity rainbow, and recent sold prices from completed eBay listings. Works with any sport.

### What Did I Pull? (/decoder)
Identify any sports card by selecting its sport, product, and matching the color/pattern to known parallels. Useful when you pull a card from a pack and don't know what version it is.

### Card Show Finder (/shows)
Find upcoming sports card shows and conventions near any US zip code. Covers major shows, local shows, and conventions across the country.

### eBay Card Search Builder (/ebay-search)
Build optimized eBay searches for sports cards with smart filters. Supports all eBay advanced search operators, category filtering, grading company filters, and price ranges. Generates a direct eBay URL.

### Collector Glossary (/learn)
100+ sports card collecting terms defined in plain language. Covers grading (PSA, BGS, SGC), card types (base, parallel, insert, auto, relic), market terms (comps, pop report, print run), and hobby slang.

## Data Coverage
- Sports: NBA, NFL, MLB, F1, WNBA
- Years: 2018-present
- Brands: Topps, Panini, Bowman, Upper Deck
- 445+ products, 28,000+ parallel variations with rarity data
- Historical sold prices from eBay completed listings

## Contact
Website: https://slabstreet.com
